recommendations: hook_bypass_via_absolute_grep_path escalated from 4-5 units to 9 units this cycle — now the highest single-cycle count; structural hook gap (absolute-path invocation not intercepted) is root cause; patching the PreToolUse hook to match /usr/bin/grep and /bin/grep in addition to bare grep would eliminate the entire category; deprioritizing other recommendations in favor of this structural fix

shell_tool_preference_violations and re_edit_thrash have been flagged 40+ and 23+ consecutive cycles respectively with zero internalization — these are not learnable from in-context history alone; pre-tool-call validation hooks are the only viable remediation path; no new recommendation text warranted as prior cycles already made this recommendation with no action taken
